# Analyse repository content and remove the root AGENTS.md file

Remove only the `AGENTS.md` file located in the repository root, however, please preserve nested `AGENTS.md` files that provide scoped instructions for any subdirectories.

# Removal definition

Before removal, confirm that the target is the repository-root `AGENTS.md` file and identify references that may become invalid. If the file does not exist,
report that no change is required. After removal, verify that the root file no longer exists, list any preserved nested `AGENTS.md` files, and report references
that require follow-up without modifying unrelated files.
